name_en: Top-tier exclusive real shot 📷 M13226 Monogram Heart Bag New arrival NANO SPEEDY DATING Handbag. This Nano Speedy handbag is crafted from the brand's classic Monogram Empreinte leather into a modern compact silhouette, with soft tones highlighting the dazzling metal hardware. The detachable chain strap offers versatile carrying options. Perfect for organizing daily essentials for day or night. 10.5 x 11.5 x 18 cm.
